name: Creamy Country Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups cubed medium red potatoes (about 1 pound)
2 tablespoons cholesterol-free reduced-calorie mayonnaise or salad dressing
1/2 cup chopped green bell pepper (about 1 small)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1-1/2 quarts water to boiling in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Add potatoes and cover the pot. Bring to boiling, then reduce heat.
3. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender. Drain well.
4. In a large glass or plastic bowl, mix together the buttermilk, lemon juice, mayonnaise (or salad dressing), Dijon mustard, thyme leaves, and salt.
5. Add the cooked potatoes, celery, and green bell pepper to the mixture. Toss until everything is evenly coated.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for about 2 hours or until completely chilled.
7. Serve at room temperature, if desired.
6 servings
